pi_items.source: Task description directly specifies this path for the organization XML output.
Task description directly specifies this path for the compensation XML output.
Manual extraction of the unique department IDs assigned to employees in the Oracle sample HR schema (hr_schema.sql) data file.
Manual extraction of the unique job IDs assigned to employees in the Oracle sample HR schema (hr_schema.sql) data file.
Verified from setup_task.sh which explicitly checks that the database has initialized correctly by ensuring EMP_COUNT is >= 100.
Task description directly instructs to create a PL/SQL function named 'GENERATE_DEPT_XML'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard Oracle HR sample schema, which is synthetic. Code analysis of hr_schema.sql confirms there are 107 total employees, 11 distinct departments that contain employees (out of 27 total), and 19 distinct job titles with employees. The target file paths /home/ga/Desktop/org_structure.xml and /home/ga/Desktop/compensation_feed.xml, and the function name GENERATE_DEPT_XML are strictly required by the task description.
